creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/version-guide has become outdated.

Fix: 

There are patches in http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/version-guide/doc.ru.articles.version-guide.diff.tbz that may correct the problem.
How-To-Repeat:   Compare the revision of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/version-guide/article.sgml and 'Original revision' in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/version-guide/article.sgml?rev=1.3;content-type=text%2Fplain
